cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. So the question is, between what times could Thomas have gone? And the options are given. Let me start by listing all the information step by step. First, Thomas woke up at 8am. That's the starting point. Now, let's look at where Thomas was at different times according to the people who saw him. David saw Thomas fixing their computer at the electronic store from 8am to 10am. So that means Thomas was at the electronic store during that time. So from 8-10 am, he was there. Then Jennifer saw Thomas buying lunch at the deli from 10am to 12pm. So from 10 am to 12 pm, Thomas was at the deli. Lisa saw Thomas walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. So between noon and 2 pm, he was heading towards the Statue of Liberty. Sarah saw Thomas buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 5pm. So from 2 pm to 5 pm, he was at the electronics store again. Kimberly saw Thomas buying a bike at the bike shop from 6pm to 9pm. So 6-9 pm, he was at the bike shop. Now, the football field was closed after 9pm. So the latest time he could have gone there is before 9 pm, but we also need to check what he was doing before that. So the question is, when was Thomas free to go to the football field? Let's break down the timeline: - 8am to 10am: electronic store (David) - 10am to 12pm: deli (Jennifer)
